title: Anthropic's Brand New AI Just Started the Gold Rush (Fable 5)
summary: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model, covering new AI use cases and agent design patterns. The video discusses capabilities, applications in regulated industries, and practical deployment strategies for AI systems.
writeup: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, walking through new use cases and agent design patterns. The discussion covers model capabilities, applications in regulated industries, and practical deployment strategies for AI systems. Specific points include long-running applications, context management, and a Know Your Agent approach to AI agents.
